cityModal.title: Select your city
cityModal.description: Choose one city before playing. You can change this later in Settings.

auth.title: Sign in or create your account
auth.subtitle: Continue your city challenge with your account.
auth.resetSent: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.
auth.firebaseMissing: Firebase is not configured. Add Firebase environment keys to enable cloud auth and sync.

errors.default: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.userNotFound: No account found with this email.
errors.emailInUse: An account with this email already exists.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
errors.network: Network issue. Check your connection and try again.
errors.configurationNotFound: Authentication is not configured for this Firebase project. Enable Email/Password sign-in in Firebase Console.
errors.operationNotAllowed: This sign-in method is not enabled. Enable Email/Password in Firebase Console.
errors.apiKeyInvalid: Firebase API key is invalid for this project configuration.

settings.title: Game preferences
settings.subtitle: Change city anytime. Gameplay and API requests are scoped to this city.

hero.title: Learn {{city}} like a local.
hero.description: Practice directions, neighborhoods, and routes across {{city}}.
hero.panelTitle: 3 quick ways to learn the city

modes.title: Start simple. Learn steadily.
modes.subtitle: Enjoy short sessions and touch-friendly actions inside {{city}}.

items.title: Direction Mode
items.description: Guess whether one {{city}} place sits north, south, east, or west of another.

items.title: Route Mode
items.description: Choose 2 to 3 connector roads to reach destination from source in {{city}}.

items.title: Map Pin Mode
items.description: Tap the correct spot on the map to strengthen local memory in {{city}}.

header.title: Pick two real places and play five quick questions.
header.subtitle: Search starts while you type and all questions stay inside {{city}}.

score.label: Score
score.roundCompleteDescription: Reset to try a different place pair in {{city}}.

question.label: Question {{index}}
question.title: Where is {{to}} from {{from}}?
question.hint: Choose the strongest direction based on coordinates.
question.wrong: Not quite. The best answer is {{answer}}.

errors.roundBuild: Could not build 5 questions for this place. Try another landmark in {{city}}.
errors.nearbyFailed: Nearby place service timed out. Try a different source in {{city}}.
errors.roundFailed: Failed to create the question set.

header.title: Build a connector path between two places.
header.subtitle: Select source and destination, then choose 2 or 3 connector routes inside {{city}}.

game.submitHint: Choose exactly 2 or 3 connectors before submitting.
game.answerCorrect: Perfect. Your connector set matches the expected route logic.
game.answerPartial: Good try. You got {{count}} out of {{total}} expected connectors.
game.answerWrong: Not quite. None of your selections matched the expected connectors.

header.title: Find places by pinning the map.
header.subtitle: Pin locations only inside {{city}} and sharpen your map memory.

game.submitHint: Tap the map to place your guess pin.
game.feedbackFar: You can get closer next time.

errors.noPlaces: Could not load enough places for {{city}}. Try again.
errors.loadFailed: Failed to load map pin questions.
errors.selectPin: Tap a point on the map before submitting.
